heading: Connect to the Federated Database Instance for Your Online Archive
body:
You can use the federated database instance connection string for your online archive to
access and query data in your online archive only.

To get the connection string from the `Data Federation` page:

You can connect through a Driver, Compass, and the MongoDB Shell.

You can also connect to the Online Archive using [OIDC](oidc-authentication-authorization).
